page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: AASP402 or AAAS402.

Formerly: AASP402.

AAAS403 The Development of a Black Aesthetic (3 Credits)

An analysis of selected areas of black creative expression in the arts for the purpose of understanding the informing principles of style, techniques, and cultural expression which make up a Black aesthetic. Prerequisite: ENGL443 or AAAS302; or permission of instructor.
